title: Incident Triage Copilot
problem: On-call engineers lose time correlating noisy alerts across logs, metrics, and runbooks, which delays incident classification and extends customer-visible downtime.
solution: The copilot clusters related alerts, summarizes blast radius, proposes likely root-cause hypotheses, and recommends next actions linked to known runbooks for faster, consistent triage.

impact.notes: Based on average weekly incident volume; expected to reduce mean time to triage from 18 to 10 minutes.
